fields.label: Node Name
fields.description: Select from the Kit Content Node master. Selecting a node pre-fills Keep Aggregated from the master default; you can override it here.

fields.label: Indent Level
fields.description: 1 = top level under the Finished Good. A row's parent is the nearest row above it with one less Indent Level.

fields.label: Keep Aggregated (Custom Explosion)
fields.description: Pre-filled from the Kit Content Node master when a node is selected. Propagates to the Kit Content Mapping as another independent default. Controls the Custom Exploded BOM explosion behaviour.
